svg.text: SEC — Managed Security Network for Banking Clients
Multi-site WAN · OSPF Area 0 Backbone · VLAN-Segmented Bank LANs
100.100.100.0/30 blocks · OSPF Area 0 · Point-to-Point Serial Links

g.text: 4 dedicated leased-line routers form a partial-mesh WAN
core (5 links) so any branch keeps reachability to SEC
even if one serial link fails.
Services: SSH mgmt · AAA local auth

svg.text: Simulated in Cisco Packet Tracer — redrawn for documentation clarity
